description.unified: Deals M.DMG per hit, attacking 7 times, to nearby enemies within a circular area. Then deals M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for [1.8 sec->1.5sec].

Deals M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for [1.2 sec->0.5sec]. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by [300->15%]. While active, releases a shockwave every [1.4 sec->1.3sec], dealing M.DMG to nearby enemies. [(removed) and stunning them for 0.6 sec.]

Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal M.DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by [200->10%]. When Kirze attacks enemies affected by [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. After 5 sec, [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes, dealing M.DMG plus an additional M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], and resets all [Arcane Crystal Energy] stacks.
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by [200->150], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by [30%->20%].

dark.unified: Each use increases DMG by 15%. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

light.unified: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] Increases duration by 4 sec.

dark.unified: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] While active, increases Kirze’s ATK Spd by 40%.

light.unified: [Arcane Crystal Curse] While active, additionally reduces ATK Spd by 10%.
At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [25%->65%] for [20 sec->10 sec].

description.unified: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [250->100].
[Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Increases DMG by [{40%->{0}%], and gains 1 additional stack when [Arcane Crystal Energy] is stacked.
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by 250 and additionally increases CC duration increase effect by {0}%.

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by [40%->30%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
